channel.title: Posts on TechTutorials Pro
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on TechTutorials Pro

item.title: Google AdSense Approval Checklist: Get Approved in 2026
item.description: Complete checklist to get Google AdSense approval. Learn requirements, common rejection reasons, and how to fix them.

item.title: How to Build a Website with HTML and CSS: Step-by-Step Guide (2026)
item.description: Learn to build your first website from scratch using HTML and CSS. Complete tutorial with code examples and best practices.

item.title: Git Basics for Beginners: Version Control Made Simple (2026)
item.description: Learn Git fundamentals: install, configure, commit, branch, merge, and collaborate on GitHub. Complete beginner's guide.

item.title: Python for Beginners: Your First Steps in Programming (2026)
item.description: Complete Python tutorial for absolute beginners. Learn variables, loops, functions, and build your first program.

item.title: How to Install VS Code Extensions: Complete Beginner's Guide (2026)
item.description: Learn how to install, manage, and optimize VS Code extensions. Step-by-step guide with screenshots for beginners.
